extra.message: User input from 'username' parameter is directly concatenated into SQL query string. This allows SQL injection attacks. Example payload: ' OR '1'='1
User input fields (name, username, password, address, email, contact) are directly interpolated into SQL query string via f-string. This allows SQL injection attacks.
User input from 'username' parameter is directly concatenated into SQL DELETE query. This allows SQL injection and unauthorized data deletion.
User input from 'user.address' is directly concatenated into SQL DELETE query. This allows SQL injection and unauthorized data deletion.

User-supplied JSON query from request body is passed directly to get_nosql_users() without validation. This allows NoSQL injection attacks where attackers can craft queries like {"username": {"$ne": null}} to bypass logic.

cwe: CWE-943: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements in Data Query Logic

extra.message: Unescaped application title (app.title) is concatenated directly into HTML response. While 'vFastAPI' is hardcoded, if title becomes user-configurable, this creates XSS vulnerability. The HTML is returned with HTMLResponse without sanitization.

cwe: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation

extra.message: Unescaped application title (app.title) is concatenated directly into HTML response. While 'vFastAPI' is hardcoded, if title becomes user-configurable, this creates XSS vulnerability. The HTML is returned with HTMLResponse without sanitization.

cwe: CWE-79: Improper Neutralization of Input During Web Page Generation

extra.message: No authentication or authorization checks on /select endpoint. Any user can query user data from the database.

cwe: CWE-306: Missing Authentication for Critical Function

extra.message: No authentication or authorization checks on /user PUT endpoint. Any user can create new user accounts in the system.

cwe: CWE-306: Missing Authentication for Critical Function

extra.message: No authentication or authorization checks on /find GET endpoint. Any user can query user data using username.

cwe: CWE-306: Missing Authentication for Critical Function

extra.message: No authentication or authorization checks on /find POST endpoint. Any user can query user data using custom NoSQL queries.

cwe: CWE-306: Missing Authentication for Critical Function

extra.message: No authentication or authorization checks on /user DELETE endpoint. Any user can delete any user account from the system.

cwe: CWE-306: Missing Authentication for Critical Function

extra.message: No authentication or authorization checks on /reset POST endpoint. Any user can reset and reinitialize the entire database.

cwe: CWE-306: Missing Authentication for Critical Function
